ApprovalDecisionRequest.description:
Write body for POST /operator/approvals/{approval_id}/decision.

reason is required for all decisions to enforce audit traceability.
High-risk approvals additionally validate non-empty reason at the
service layer.
ApprovalDecisionRequest.title: ApprovalDecisionRequest

ApprovalDecisionResponse.description: Response envelope for approval decision writes.
ApprovalDecisionResponse.title: ApprovalDecisionResponse

CreateActionPayload.description:
POST /operator/growth/actions — create draft body.

Supports all three creation entry points:
  • from PriceOps recommendation row  (sourceRecommendationId set)
  • from recommendations entry         (sourceRecommendationId set, payload-driven)
  • direct new-action entry            (no sourceRecommendationId)
CreateActionPayload.title: CreateActionPayload

ErrorEnvelope.description: The single error contract for every endpoint.

code.description: Stable machine-readable code; clients branch on this.
code.title: Code

correlation_id.description: Correlation ID; matches the X-Correlation-Id response header and audit log.
correlation_id.title: Correlation Id

details.description: Per-field or per-cause breakdown; empty when the error is not field-scoped.
details.title: Details

message.description: Human-readable summary; safe to display to an operator.
message.title: Message

next_action.description: What the caller should do next.
next_action.title: Next Action

occurred_at.description: RFC3339 UTC timestamp of when the error was produced.
occurred_at.title: Occurred At

ErrorEnvelope.title: ErrorEnvelope

ErrorResponse.description:
Full error body: the structured envelope plus the legacy ``detail``.

Declared as a model so it lands in the OpenAPI artifact and therefore in the
generated TypeScript client, rather than being an undocumented dict.

detail.description: Legacy detail, passed through exactly as the route produced it: a string, Pydantic's [{loc,msg,type}] array, or a route-specific object. Retained unchanged for existing consumers. New clients should read `error` instead.
detail.title: Detail

ErrorResponse.title: ErrorResponse

EvidencePurposeRequest.description:
Write body for POST /operator/evidence/{evidence_id}/purpose.

privacyAcknowledged must be True for camera evidence kinds.
retentionHours must not exceed the policy ceiling (72 h default).
EvidencePurposeRequest.title: EvidencePurposeRequest

EvidencePurposeResponse.description: Response envelope for evidence purpose unlock.
EvidencePurposeResponse.title: EvidencePurposeResponse

IntakePromotePayload.description: Promotion carries no extra fields beyond the risk disclosure.
IntakePromotePayload.title: IntakePromotePayload

IssueTransitionResponse.description: Response envelope for issue transition writes.
IssueTransitionResponse.title: IssueTransitionResponse

apps__api__app__routes__operator_modules.description: POST /operator/growth/conflicts/check — run the five conflict checks.
apps__api__app__routes__operator_modules.title: ConflictCheckPayload

List plans with consistent pagination, filtering and sorting.

The response keeps `items` and `count` with their existing meaning
(`count` is this page's size) and adds `total`/`limit`/`offset`/
`has_more`, so a caller that ignores the new fields and passes no
query parameters sees what it saw before.
